llm_eval.notes: py_compile OK; stdin/empty/conflict cases run (exit 0/2 correct hook semantics); valid # /// script frontmatter; fail-open except Exception is intentional for advisory hook so harness never crashes; write-scope limited to .claude/logs with mkdir parents=True. Minor: TaskCreated-only design never releases ownership so state grows and stale tasks block forever (documented scope, not code defect).
